title: KankeAnkan's Ultimate Modpack
description: A wide variety of 1.20.1 mods to make the ultimate fabric modpack
body:
Welcome to KankeAnkan's ULTIMATE FABRIC MODPACK. This modpack contains a wide variety of content for you to explore, here are some examples:

- Optimization Mods: Sodium, FerriteCore, Lithium, Clumps, Entity Culling

- Tech Mods: Applied Energistics 2, Create + Addons, Immersive Aircraft

- Exploration Mods: Dungeons & Taverns, Terralith, Lootr, Regions Unexplored
